title: Pandavkada Falls
tagline: Pandavkada Falls — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Pandavkada Falls is a waterfall located Kharghar, a suburb of Navi Mumbai.
overview.description: Pandavkada Falls is a waterfall located Kharghar, a suburb of Navi Mumbai. The waterfall, about 107 metres high is a type of 'plunge' waterfall in nature pouring in massive amounts of water on the rocky surface underneath.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Central Park, Kharghar
topPlaces.description: The Central Park of Kharghar is an urban park in Navi Mumbai, India that covers an area of around 119 hectares (290 acres) spread across the city's sectors 23,24 and 25.

topPlaces.name: Kharghar
topPlaces.description: Kharghar is a node of Navi Mumbai situated in South Navi Mumbai of Raigad District and administrative under Panvel Municipal Corporation. Prashant Thakur, MLA, represents Kharghar in the Legislative Assembly as part of the Panvel constituency.

topPlaces.name: Taloja Central Jail
topPlaces.description: Taloja Central Jail is a prison in the node of Taloja near Taloja Panchnand railway station of the city of Navi Mumbai in the state of Maharashtra in India. It was opened in 2008 and has capacity for 3000 inmates.

topPlaces.name: Cross Cafe
topPlaces.description: Cross Cafe, formerly known as Hitlers' Cross or Hitler's Cross, was an Adolf Hitler-themed restaurant at Kharghar in Navi Mumbai, a satellite city of Mumbai. The restaurant's former name, "Hitlers' Cross", referred to the swastika and the Cross of Honour of the German Mother, symbols of the Nazi regime, and the restaurant's interior was decorated in red, white and black - the colours of the Nazi party.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vihar
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vihar, is a housing complex in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai developed by CGEWHO (Central Government Employees Welfare Housing Organisation), an autonomous society of Central Government, which takes care of housing of Central Government employees across India. It is the biggest project of CGEWHO and is one of the best colonies in Navi Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Rohinjan
topPlaces.description: Rohinjan is a village situated in Taloja, under panvel municipal corporation Navi mumbai acquired by (CIDCO) on old mumbai pune highway Rohinjan- kiravali is situated near Kharghar it has metro and railway station at 1.5 to 2.5 km (0.93 to 1.55 mi) distance, is now a major attraction for new building projects. This area also has the tallest tower Adhiraj samyama of Navi Mumbai Raigad district in Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Taloje Panchnand
topPlaces.description: Taloja is a census town in the Raigad district of Navi Mumbai city, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is an extension of the Kharghar node and governed by the Panvel Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: DY Patil Stadium
topPlaces.description: The DY Patil Stadium is a multi-purpose sports arena in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Owned by Dnyandeo Yashwantrao Patil, it is based in the DY Patil Sports Academy in Nerul.

items.note: The Central Park of Kharghar is an urban park in Navi Mumbai, India that covers an area of around 119 hectares (290 acres) spread across the city's sectors 23,24 and 25.

Kharghar is a node of Navi Mumbai situated in South Navi Mumbai of Raigad District and administrative under Panvel Municipal Corporation. Prashant Thakur, MLA, represents Kharghar in the Legislative Assembly as part of the Panvel constituency.

Taloja Central Jail is a prison in the node of Taloja near Taloja Panchnand railway station of the city of Navi Mumbai in the state of Maharashtra in India. It was opened in 2008 and has capacity for 3000 inmates.

Cross Cafe, formerly known as Hitlers' Cross or Hitler's Cross, was an Adolf Hitler-themed restaurant at Kharghar in Navi Mumbai, a satellite city of Mumbai. The restaurant's former name, "Hitlers' Cross", referred to the swastika and the Cross of Honour of the German Mother, symbols of the Nazi regime, and the restaurant's interior was decorated in red, white and black - the colours of the Nazi party.

Kendriya Vihar, is a housing complex in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai developed by CGEWHO (Central Government Employees Welfare Housing Organisation), an autonomous society of Central Government, which takes care of housing of Central Government employees across India. It is the biggest project of CGEWHO and is one of the best colonies in Navi Mumbai.

Rohinjan is a village situated in Taloja, under panvel municipal corporation Navi mumbai acquired by (CIDCO) on old mumbai pune highway Rohinjan- kiravali is situated near Kharghar it has metro and railway station at 1.5 to 2.5 km (0.93 to 1.55 mi) distance, is now a major attraction for new building projects. This area also has the tallest tower Adhiraj samyama of Navi Mumbai Raigad district in Maharashtra, India.
Taloja is a census town in the Raigad district of Navi Mumbai city, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is an extension of the Kharghar node and governed by the Panvel Municipal Corporation.
The DY Patil Stadium is a multi-purpose sports arena in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Owned by Dnyandeo Yashwantrao Patil, it is based in the DY Patil Sports Academy in Nerul.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pandavkada Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pandavkada Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pandavkada Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pandavkada Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pandavkada Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pandavkada Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Pandavkada Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pandavkada Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Central Park, Kharghar, Kharghar, Taloja Central Jail, Cross Cafe, Kendriya Vihar.
